lint.note: flake8 not installed - command echoes 'flake8 not installed' per services.yaml spec

rejectedObservations.observation: The --format option changed from 'json' to 'json-ld' as default - breaking change for existing scripts using --format json
rejectedObservations.reason: This was an intentional design decision per the output milestone requirements. VAL-CROSS-002 backward compatibility covers plan/build-request/invoke commands only, not pipeline. The AGENTS.md Output Formats table already shows json-ld as the format. No action needed.
